personality: 7 Dark-First Utility DARK with 6 Glass / Luxe surfaces
personality_one_liner: A premium, high-contrast driving command center where critical speed data pulses in real-time against a deep night map, enhanced by frosted glass overlays and electric Web3 accents.

spacing.rule: Generous touch targets (min 44pt) for moving vehicles. Avoid cramped layouts. Safe-area must be rigorously respected.

do's: Use glass heavily for UI overlays on top of the map (bottom tab bar, speed sign container, timeline container).
Pair blur with a translucent tinted base (>= 75% of surface) to ensure text legibility over the busy map.
dont's: Don't apply glass to primary data metrics where pure contrast is needed.

screens.name: Accueil
screens.purpose: Full-screen GPS map tracking current speed against the limit with visual warnings.

states.loading: Map skeleton or deep blue splash with glowing Signo logo.
states.empty: N/A - GPS tracking is always active.
states.error: Loss of GPS signal: Red banner overlay at the top.

screens.layout: Root is a full-bleed map. Floating glass panel center-top for the European Speed Sign (White circle, red border, black text). Real-time speed displayed prominently, changing color (Green, Orange, Red) based on compliance. Right edge contains a vertical glass timeline for upcoming limits (500m, 2km). Floating glass bottom tab bar.

screens.name: Trajets
screens.purpose: History of past trips with distance, duration, and overspeeding analytics.

states.empty: Illustration of an empty dark highway with 'Aucun trajet enregistré' and a 'Démarrer' button.
states.error: Error fetching history with retry button.

screens.layout: Standard list view with cards. Each card uses surfaceSecondary with subtle border. Metrics (date, distance, avg speed) are laid out in a grid. Highlighting overspeeds in red.

screens.name: Alertes
screens.purpose: Log of recent overspeed warnings and visual/audio alert management.

states.empty: Illustration of a clear road with 'Aucune infraction. Parfait !'

screens.layout: Feed of alert items. Left-aligned icon (red triangle/siren) in a brandTertiary tinted box, with alert details, location, and severity.

screens.name: Récompenses
screens.purpose: Claim $FRE token rewards for safe driving.

states.empty: Zero balance state with motivational copy to start driving.

screens.layout: Hero section with abstract glowing purple background. Huge token balance display. Progress bar (1 FRE / 10 km) towards the 1000 FRE threshold. Primary CTA 'Réclamer' (disabled if <1000). A section below for 'Adresse wallet TON' with a glassmorphic input field.

screens.name: Profil
screens.purpose: User driving statistics and global score.
screens.layout: Cover image with abstract electric purple glow. Profile info, global compliance score (in green/red depending on health), total distance driven.

screens.name: Paramètres
screens.purpose: App settings, audio warnings configuration, map theme options.
screens.layout: Sectioned list with toggles for Audio Alerts, Visual Alerts. Use standard list rows with leading icons.

map_placeholder.alt: Dark night city map view from above

rewards_banner.alt: Abstract electric purple and deep blue wavy background

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the user's request for 6 bottom tabs (Accueil, Trajets, Alertes, Récompenses, Profil, Paramètres). Use a scrollable tab bar if necessary, or pack them closely but keep touch targets readable.
Map UI: Use react-native-maps. You MUST style the map with a custom JSON map style to match the dark night blue theme (#050B2E). Use a glowing purple (#7A3CFF) line for the route.
European Speed Limit Sign: Create this entirely with UI components. A white circular View, a thick red border (using the 'error' color token), and black text inside displaying the number.
Make sure all text inside the app is in French as requested.
The real-time speed metric needs to be extremely prominent. Change its color dynamically: 'success' (Green) when compliant, 'warning' (Orange) when near limit, 'error' (Red) when overspeeding.
Vertical timeline: Render this as a floating frosted glass column on the right side of the screen with nodes for 500m, 2km, 5km.
Rewards screen: Build a Web3-style dashboard with a progress bar mapped to 1000 FRE. Include a TON wallet address input field with 'surfaceTertiary' background.
Ensure all overlay panels on the map use expo-blur to provide a premium, Glass / Luxe feel, maintaining strong text legibility.
